notes: Use function-icons for the three top summary cards: stamps, cities, shops.
Use city-icons for city list rows; do not bake city names into images.
Use city-tiles only as visual reference or picker thumbnails, not inside dense rows unless the UI has room.
Chinese city icons were appended after the existing city icons; use labelZh for Chinese UI city names.
For unknown Chinese cities, fall back to /assets/label-icons/function-icons/02-city-count.png.
